content:
- Read current progress memory and parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md.
- Applied bug-first rule: all bug tasks are passing (no <passes>false</passes> or <passing>false</passing> in bugs).
- Found multiple non-bug tasks with <passes>false</passes>; selected highest-priority unblocked task by priority tags.
- Chose .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/36-task-enforce-post-startup-hands-off-test-policy-no-direct-coordination.md because it is <priority>high</priority> and unblocked (35 is done).
- Wrote selected path to .ralph/current_task.txt and will stop immediately per loop instructions.

- Loaded prior Ralph progress and read `.ralph/current_task.txt`; active task is story-rust-system-harness task 36 (post-startup hands-off policy).
- Audited current policy and runtime surfaces with parallel searches: reviewed `tests/policy_e2e_api_only.rs`, `src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs`, `tests/bdd_api_http.rs`, `src/runtime/node.rs`, and test/harness modules for direct DCS/internal coordination patterns.
- Confirmed node-starting runtime e2e scope is primarily `src/ha/e2e_*.rs`; contract/unit tests in other modules intentionally use internals and should not be swept by post-start policy guard.
- Wrote a full detailed implementation plan directly into task 36 markdown with: audit findings, explicit allowed/forbidden post-start actions, file-by-file change list, execution phases, and skeptical risk checks.
- Added required marker `TO BE VERIFIED` at the end of task 36 and stopped without execution phase changes.
- Next immediate step for next pass: perform deep skeptical verification, alter at least one plan item, then replace marker with `NOW EXECUTE` before implementation.
